# Kalmeer Group

> Kalmeer Group is a Cape Town-based coaching business serving clients worldwide. Tagline: "Bringing calm to the chaos." In the world's toughest job market, Kalmeer helps professionals get hired, get heard, and get paid what they're worth — and runs the I See You movement for people rebuilding after illness, injury, or loss.

## Services
- [Coaching](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/coaching.html): The Clarity Session (60 minutes, R1,250) and Own Your Story, a six-week communication and presence programme (R7,500 one-on-one, R6,500 cohort seat). Corporate keynotes and workshops from R24,500, including First Interview Ready — a sponsored one-day work-readiness cohort for 20 young South Africans.
- [Free masterclass](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/masterclass.html): 20 minutes on the three habits that keep experienced professionals undersold.
- [Kalmeer Academy](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/academy.html): self-paced courses for speaking, storytelling, and career momentum — launching soon.
- [The Circle](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/circle.html): membership community (founding members R199/month) with monthly live storytelling evenings.
- [Shop](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/shop.html): career document pack, toolkits, workshop seats.

## I See You
- [The movement](https://www.kalmeergroup.com/i-see-you.html): a monthly showcase of survivors' stories told with dignity; a funded coaching seat in every cohort; quarterly storytelling evenings. No featured storyteller ever pays.

## Contact
- Email: kalmeergroup@gmail.com
